summary.lv: Redwire Defense Tech Riga meklē Embedded Software Developer, kurš izstrādās mikrokontrolleru programmatūru autonomajām bezpilota gaisa kuģu sistēmām, izmantojot C/C++ un RTOS. Darbs klātienē Rīgā, atalgojums €2850–3950 mēnesī.
summary.en: Redwire Defense Tech Riga seeks an Embedded Software Developer to design and test firmware for autonomous unmanned aircraft systems using C/C++, RTOS, and SPI/I2C/UART/CAN protocols, offering €2,850–3,950/month.
